title: Biological Foundation Models - Researcher Index
description: A curated, filterable catalog of foundation models and related resources for biological sequences, molecules, structures, omics, cells, and tissue images.

affiliation.name: Institute of Molecular Genetics of the Czech Academy of Sciences
Institute of Molecular Genetics of the Czech Academy of Sciences

rights_statement: Catalog data, metadata, and original documentation are licensed under CC BY 4.0; maintenance and build software are licensed under MIT. Third-party papers, model artifacts, external software, services, logos, and trademarks remain under their own terms. IMG CAS is the curator's affiliation, not the publisher or an endorsement.
provenance: Curated from primary papers, official repositories, model hubs, project pages, and explicit licence or access terms. All 377 candidates received source-level review on 2026-07-13 against the recorded source baseline. The 345 records meeting the release policy form the canonical displayed catalog; 32 unresolved candidates are preserved losslessly in a separate under-review register. Generated distributions come from the canonical JSON through a deterministic build.
evidence_statement: All 377 candidates were source-reviewed on 2026-07-13. The displayed catalog contains 345 release-policy records: 231 verified and 114 verified with visible limitations. Thirty-two unresolved candidates are excluded from the index and preserved with stable IDs, evidence, reasons, and reconsideration conditions in the repository's under-review register.
